original_query: with my_customers as (  select distinct c_customer_sk         , c_current_addr_sk  from         ( select cs_sold_date_sk sold_date_sk,                  cs_bill_customer_sk customer_sk,                  cs_item_sk item_sk,                  cs_wholesale_cost wholesale_cost           from   catalog_sales           union all           select ws_sold_date_sk sold_date_sk,                  ws_bill_customer_sk customer_sk,                  ws_item_sk item_sk,                  ws_wholesale_cost wholesale_cost           from   web_sales          ) cs_or_ws_sales,          item,          date_dim,          customer  where   sold_date_sk = d_date_sk          and item_sk = i_item_sk          and i_category = 'Sports'          and i_class = 'camping'          and c_customer_sk = cs_or_ws_sales.customer_sk          and d_moy = 6          and d_year = 2001          and wholesale_cost BETWEEN 18 AND 48          and c_birth_year BETWEEN 1932 AND 1945  )  , my_revenue as (  select c_customer_sk,         sum(ss_ext_sales_price) as revenue  from   my_customers,         store_sales,         customer_address,         store,         date_dim  where  c_current_addr_sk = ca_address_sk         and ca_county = s_county         and ca_state = s_state         and ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk         and c_customer_sk = ss_customer_sk         and ss_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 18 AND 48         and s_state in ('IA','MD','MO'                     ,'MS','NE','NY'                     ,'OK','TN','TX'                     ,'VA')         and d_month_seq between (select distinct d_month_seq+1                                  from   date_dim where d_year = 2001 and d_moy = 6)                            and  (select distinct d_month_seq+3                                  from   date_dim where d_year = 2001 and d_moy = 6)  group by c_customer_sk  )  , segments as  (select cast((revenue/50) as int) as segment   from   my_revenue  )   select  segment, count(*) as num_customers, segment*50 as segment_base  from segments  group by segment  order by segment, num_customers  limit 100;
rewritten_query:
WITH base_date AS (
  SELECT d_month_seq
  FROM date_dim
  WHERE d_year = 2001 AND d_moy = 6
  LIMIT 1
), my_customers AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT c.c_customer_sk, c.c_current_addr_sk
  FROM (
    SELECT cs.cs_bill_customer_sk AS customer_sk
    FROM catalog_sales cs
    JOIN item i ON cs.cs_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim d ON cs.cs_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
    WHERE i.i_category = 'Sports'
      AND i.i_class = 'camping'
      AND d.d_moy = 6
      AND d.d_year = 2001
      AND cs.cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 18 AND 48
    UNION ALL
    SELECT ws.ws_bill_customer_sk AS customer_sk
    FROM web_sales ws
    JOIN item i ON ws.ws_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim d ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
    WHERE i.i_category = 'Sports'
      AND i.i_class = 'camping'
      AND d.d_moy = 6
      AND d.d_year = 2001
      AND ws.ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 18 AND 48
  ) sales
  JOIN customer c ON c.c_customer_sk = sales.customer_sk
  WHERE c.c_birth_year BETWEEN 1932 AND 1945
), my_revenue AS (
  SELECT mc.c_customer_sk, SUM(ss.ss_ext_sales_price) AS revenue
  FROM my_customers mc
  JOIN store_sales ss ON mc.c_customer_sk = ss.ss_customer_sk
  JOIN customer_address ca ON mc.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
  JOIN store s ON ca.ca_county = s.s_county AND ca.ca_state = s.s_state
  JOIN date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
  CROSS JOIN base_date b
  WHERE ss.ss_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 18 AND 48
    AND s.s_state IN ('IA','MD','MO','MS','NE','NY','OK','TN','TX','VA')
    AND d.d_month_seq BETWEEN b.d_month_seq + 1 AND b.d_month_seq + 3
  GROUP BY mc.c_customer_sk
), segments AS (
  SELECT (revenue / 50)::INT AS segment
  FROM my_revenue
)
SELECT segment, COUNT(*) AS num_customers, segment * 50 AS segment_base
FROM segments
GROUP BY segment
ORDER BY segment, num_customers
LIMIT 100;

rewrite_suggestion.nave_suggestion: Created a base_date CTE to compute the date range once instead of using two separate subqueries for d_month_seq calculation
Pushed filters into each part of the UNION ALL to filter data earlier in the query execution
Restructured the join order and pushed join conditions to reduce the amount of data processed in the joins
